title: DoorDash's Deliveroo Acquisition: A Bold Play for Global Dominance in Local Commerce
text: DoorDash's acquisition of Deliveroo for approximately $3.9 billion became effective in September 2025, representing a strategic expansion into European and Middle Eastern markets. For 2024, Deliveroo generated £7.1 billion GTV (+8% vs 2023), revenue of approximately £2.0 billion and adjusted EBITDA of approximately £140 million. The combined entity is expected to benefit from DoorDash's technological infrastructure including ghost kitchens, AI-driven routing, and data analytics to optimize Deliveroo's delivery costs. Raymond James forecasts mid-teens EBITDA accretion in 2026 and high-teens accretion in 2027 from this acquisition. DoorDash is investing several hundred million dollars more in 2026 to unify its international platforms (Wolt and Deliveroo) under a single global tech stack, which promises long-term operational efficiency and reduced delivery costs but pressures near-term profitability.
